subject: 理論
statement: 抵抗 R=10kΩ とコンデンサ C=4μF を直列に接続した RC 回路の時定数 τ〔ms〕は?
figure: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 250 140" role="img" aria-label="抵抗R=10kΩとコンデンサC=4μFの直列RC回路" font-family="system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13"><title>抵抗R=10kΩとコンデンサC=4μFの直列RC回路</title><g stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="40" cy="70" r="20" fill="none"/><text x="40" y="75" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" text-anchor="middle">V</text><line x1="40" y1="50" x2="40" y2="30"/><line x1="40" y1="90" x2="40" y2="110"/><line x1="40" y1="110" x2="190" y2="110"/><line x1="190" y1="110" x2="190" y2="30"/><line x1="70" y1="30" x2="90" y2="30"/><rect x="90" y="21" width="40" height="18" fill="none"/><line x1="130" y1="30" x2="150" y2="30"/><text x="110" y="16" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" text-anchor="middle">R=10kΩ</text><line x1="150" y1="30" x2="190" y2="30"/><line x1="190" y1="30" x2="190" y2="60"/><line x1="176" y1="60" x2="204" y2="60"/><line x1="176" y1="68" x2="204" y2="68"/><line x1="190" y1="68" x2="190" y2="110"/><text x="210" y="66" fill="currentColor" stroke="none">C=4μF</text><text x="115" y="126" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" text-anchor="middle">τ=R·C</text></g></svg>
solution: kΩ×μF=10³×10⁻⁶ s=10⁻³ s=1ms なので τ〔ms〕=R〔kΩ〕×C〔μF〕
